title: How to reset your CloudDash API key
content: To reset your CloudDash API key, log in to your account and navigate to Settings > API Keys. Click on the 'Revoke & Generate New Key' button next to your active key. Make sure to update your application with the new key immediately, as the old key will stop working instantly. This process ensures your CloudDash account remains secure. If you have automated pipelines, remember to rotate the keys in your secrets manager. For Enterprise customers, key rotation can be enforced every 90 days. This section provides additional context to ensure comprehensive documentation. The CloudDash platform is built with robustness and scalability in mind. When encountering issues, always verify your configuration settings and ensure that your network allows communication with our endpoints. If you continue to experience difficulties, please consult the troubleshooting steps outlined previously. Our support team is available to assist you with any advanced configurations or unexpected behavior. Remember to keep your agent versions up to date to benefit from the latest features and security patches. Furthermore, monitoring your usage limits can prevent unexpected service interruptions. For detailed API specifications, refer to our developer portal. We are committed to providing reliable service and continuous improvements to our platform. Should you have any feedback or feature requests, do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing CloudDash as your monitoring solution. We hope this guide has been helpful in resolving your query.
